propositions: Every action reference in release.yml uses moving version tags instead of full commit SHAs, so identical source SHAs can execute different code.
Release checkouts do not set persist-credentials: false, leaving the git token persisted in local config.
Build tools install with unrestricted upgrades and no hash-locked constraints, allowing unpinned/ambient package resolution during a release.

The MCP publisher is downloaded from a mutable releases/latest URL and executed without a digest or signature check in a job holding id-token: write, co-locating OIDC privilege with an unverified binary.
Enforce pinning via zizmor and actionlint under make lint plus a rebar-specific test asserting --no-isolation, the mcp_verify/mcp_registry permission split, chmod +x, and evidence-fragment wiring.
Split the MCP publish into an unprivileged mcp_verify job that downloads and verifies the archive and an OIDC-privileged mcp_registry job that consumes only the verified artifact.
